caption: A man wearing a white button-down shirt with gold suspenders, a bow tie, glasses, and a large, pointed gray wig sits in front of a microphone in what appears to be a clothing store. Behind him, the walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs and mannequins wearing vests. He wears over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional microphone. On the left side of the screen, a logo featuring a microphone and the text "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" is visible, while a similar logo reading "BOSS TALK JOY" appears on the right. Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated, slightly shifting his head and facial expressions as he speaks, though his general posture and position within the frame remain consistent. The background remains static, maintaining the store's interior layout of clothing and imagery.
